posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Introducing the Automation Error Quick Reporting feature!

We are super excited to announce the addition of a Report issue" button in the automation activity log that automatically pulls the technical details of a faulty recipe into an email via your default email app, ready to send to our support team.

https://global.discourse-cdn.com/monday/original/3X/e/d/ed35952e3d5bf22aa34ff7284129998d081f89eb.mov

This update will help improve the overall reporting process and pave the way for a more complete and efficient experience for our users and technical team. We look forward to hearing your feedback about this more streamlined experience!

We are excited about this! Are you?! Tell us below
